Create `.benchmark/benchmark-contract-audit.md`.

Write a `## Suite Loading` section with exactly 4 bullet points.

Across the 4 bullets, cover:
- where benchmark suites are decoded and validated, including `internal/repository/benchmark.go`
- where suite loading is wired into the app layer, including `internal/app/benchmark_runner.go`
- the exact symbols `LoadBenchmarkSuite`, `LoadBenchmarkSuites`, and `ValidateBenchmarkFixtureReferences`
- the duplicate-suite failure string `duplicate benchmark suite id`

Ground every bullet in the current repository code. Do not speculate or propose changes yet.
